offer: For property managers managing 5–15 properties, inconsistent scheduling causes compliance issues. We automate scheduling instead of manual scheduling via email or phone calls.
problem: Inconsistent scheduling of equipment inspections leading to potential compliance issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property management advice
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about scheduling tools
Direct message 20-50 property managers with demo video
Join community forums for property management resources
try_it: Let users try simple scheduling interface and confirmation tracking for completed inspections on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showcasing the scheduling process
Conduct 10 short interviews with potential users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
Include one-click export for simple reports
